_comment: Story 2.4 + 2.5 Stryker mutation config (SEC-6, DoD-9). Run from packages/editorial: npx stryker run. Targets the editorial log repository + contract types. Threshold >=90% combined score. Per-file goal: >=95% on editorial-log-repo.ts (Story 2.5 DoD-5). Story 2.4 targets TC-3.1..TC-3.15 killed by tests/integration/editorial-log.integration.test.ts (35) + tests/contract/editorial-boundary.contract.test.ts (10) + tests/perf/editorial-log.perf.test.ts (3) + tests/chaos/editorial-log.chaos.test.ts (3). Story 2.5 targets TC-2.5-MUT-1..TC-2.5-MUT-8 killed by tests/integration/editorial-log-concurrency.integration.test.ts (12) + tests/chaos/editorial-log-concurrency.chaos.test.ts (4) + tests/perf/editorial-log-concurrency.perf.test.ts (3).
_concurrency_note: concurrency:1 — parallelism masks mutants under concurrent writers (DoD-9)

_targets.TC-3.1: prevHash check bypass — killed by TC-1.6/1.7 (tamper detection)
_targets.TC-3.2: Signature verification bypass — killed by TC-1.13/1.14
_targets.TC-3.3: Concurrency serializability bypass — killed by TC-1.16/1.17/1.18
_targets.TC-3.4: Write-only check bypass — killed by TC-1.31/1.32
_targets.TC-3.5: Event name pattern bypass — killed by TC-1.24/1.25
_targets.TC-3.6: Genesis hash constant mutation — killed by TC-1.3, TC-2.10
_targets.TC-3.7: JCS key sorting bypass — killed by TC-1.26/1.27/1.30
_targets.TC-3.8: Hash formula mutation — killed by TC-2.4
_targets.TC-3.9: Sequence gap detection bypass — killed by TC-1.8/1.9
_targets.TC-3.10: jti uniqueness bypass — killed by TC-1.21
_targets.TC-3.12: Retry count mutation — killed by TC-1.18
_targets.TC-3.13: Genesis auto-bootstrap bypass — killed by TC-1.3
_targets.TC-3.14: Partition isolation bypass — killed by TC-1.19
_targets.TC-3.15: Truncation detection bypass — killed by TC-1.33

_targets_2_5._note: Story 2.5 (AR-27, VAL-3.7) — 8 new mutation targets for concurrency model code. Each is killed by the named TC-2.5-CONC/CHAOS test. concurrency:1 is load-bearing (DoD-9): parallelism masks mutants under concurrent writers.
_targets_2_5.TC-2.5-MUT-1: CAS WHERE NOT EXISTS clause removed — killed by TC-2.5-CONC-5 (duplicate seq) + TC-2.5-CONC-1 (chain integrity under 50 writers)
_targets_2_5.TC-2.5-MUT-2: Retry count ceiling mutated (5 → 0 or Infinity) — killed by TC-2.5-CONC-2 (exhaustion) + TC-2.5-CONC-1 (infinite loop / no retry)
_targets_2_5.TC-2.5-MUT-3: Backoff multiplier mutated (1.6x → 1.0x linear) — killed by TC-2.5-CONC-12 (distribution divergence)
_targets_2_5.TC-2.5-MUT-4: Jitter removed (full jitter → fixed delay) — killed by TC-2.5-CONC-12 (correlated retry schedules)
_targets_2_5.TC-2.5-MUT-5: Genesis bootstrap skipped — killed by TC-2.5-CONC-3 (missing seq=0 under race)
_targets_2_5.TC-2.5-MUT-6: Tip re-read skipped on retry (stale tip reused) — killed by TC-2.5-CONC-1 (wrong prev_hash cascade)
_targets_2_5.TC-2.5-MUT-7: append() tip-continuity check bypassed — killed by TC-2.5-CONC-6 (wrong prev_hash accepted)
_targets_2_5.TC-2.5-MUT-8: Re-signing callback failure swallowed (try/catch + continue) — killed by TC-2.5-CONC-10 (error not propagated)
